commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.matrix: for rows in 2 4 8; do env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model <model> --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size $rows --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-iter367-current-c248-after-c4-first9/c${rows}-default.json; done; then rerun c2 three times after first c2 flake

conclusion: Post-c4-first-nine current default final matrix is generated-token green using the final c2 repeat plus c4/c8 controls: c2 [137,137] with serial_lm_head/native_caware_decode=true, c4 [137]*4 with first-nine rowchunk layers [3,7,11,15,19,23,27,31,35], and c8 [137]*8 with the same first-nine layer list and stabilize_cast_elems=256. The first c2 attempt in the matrix flaked red at [137,0] before three immediate c2 repeats and the required active verify recovered to [137,137]; keep residual c2 transient risk open. No retained throughput/scaling claim is made.
hardware: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX via HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: after the c4 first-nine promotion, the final c2/c4/c8 generated-token equality matrix is green vs independent c1 and the artifact preserves GPU1/XTX provenance. The initial c2 flake is explicitly recorded as residual risk; no retained performance claim.
